children.heading: Audit
children.label: 1 Audit
children.text: The term “audit” means an examination of the financial statements, reports, documents, procedures, controls, or notices of any issuer, broker, or dealer by an independent public accounting firm in accordance with the rules of the Board or the Commission, for the purpose of expressing an opinion on the financial statements or providing an audit report.

children.label: A
children.text: prepared following an audit performed for purposes of compliance by an issuer, broker, or dealer with the requirements of the securities laws; and

children.label: i
children.text: sets forth the opinion of that firm regarding a financial statement, report, notice, or other document, procedures, or controls; or

children.label: ii
children.text: asserts that no such opinion can be expressed.

children.heading: Broker
children.label: 3 Broker
children.text: The term “broker” means a broker (as such term is defined in ) that is required to file a balance sheet, income statement, or other financial statement under , where such balance sheet, income statement, or financial statement is required to be certified by a registered public accounting firm.section 78c(a)(4) of this titlesection 78q(e)(1)(A) of this title

children.heading: Dealer
children.label: 4 Dealer
children.text: The term “dealer” means a dealer (as such term is defined in ) that is required to file a balance sheet, income statement, or other financial statement under , where such balance sheet, income statement, or financial statement is required to be certified by a registered public accounting firm.section 78c(a)(5) of this titlesection 78q(e)(1)(A) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: established by the standard setting body described in , as amended by this Act, or prescribed by the Commission under or ; andsection 77s(b) of this titlesection 77s(a) of this titlesection 78m(b) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: relevant to audit reports for particular issuers, brokers, or dealers, or dealt with in the quality control system of a particular registered public accounting firm; and

children.label: i
children.text: relate to the preparation or issuance of audit reports for issuers, brokers, or dealers; and

children.label: ii
children.text: are established or adopted by the Board under , or are promulgated as rules of the Commission.section 7213(a) of this title

children.heading: Self-regulatory organization
children.label: 6 Self-regulatory organization
children.text: The term “self-regulatory organization” has the same meaning as in .section 78c(a) of this title
